levelName: Level 100: Final Boss - The Menu System
puzzleDescription: Create a simple calculator menu. Call the correct method based on the 'choice' variable (1 for Add, 2 for Multiply).
objective: Use a switch statement inside main to call add(a, b) or multiply(a, b) based on the given 'choice'.
hints: Use 'switch(choice)' to decide which method to call.
For 'case 1:', call 'add(x, y);'. Don't forget the 'break;'.
This structure is the foundation of every interactive terminal application.
